issues.finding: LIME implementation is a custom Ridge approximation, NOT the official lime package
issues.detail: This is a documented simplification. Valid for local linear attribution but less robust than official LIME.

issues.finding: Grad-CAM implementation is a finite-difference proxy, NOT a true neural network Grad-CAM
issues.detail: Report calls it "proxy" -- correctly labeled. Valid for tree models but NOT equivalent to CNN Grad-CAM.

issues.finding: Counterfactual is a manual feature-pivot, NOT a formal CF algorithm (DICE/Wachter)
issues.detail: Valid for clinical illustration but may not find nearest CF on data manifold.

issues.finding: ALL 45 physician responses are SYNTHETIC SIMULATION -- NOT real physicians
issues.detail: Report must explicitly state: physician evaluation is a SIMULATION, not a real user study. Reporting as clinical evidence would be misleading.

issues.finding: NPS Promoters mere 1/45 (2%) -- extremely low adoption signal
issues.detail: This is realistic but should be flagged: model is not yet clinically persuasive.

issues.finding: ALL 26 patient KRAS values are DL-imputed (not measured clinically)
issues.detail: Must be labeled as imputed/synthetic in any publication. Cannot be reported as measured values.

issues.finding: Cohort v4 PFS/OS outcomes are formula-generated (arm x kras x prpc x msi parameters)
issues.detail: NOT from real clinical trial data. Model trained on these cannot validly claim clinical predictive performance. Must be presented as illustrative simulation only.

issues.finding: OS/PFS model R2=0.056 -- essentially no predictive power
issues.detail: The explanation "synthetic cohort noise" is valid but must be prominently stated. This model should NOT be used for clinical decision support in current form.

issues.finding: Synergy model R2=0.996 trained partially on synthetic/curated Bliss data
issues.detail: High R2 may partly reflect circular validation: synthetic targets generated with similar distributions to training features. External validation on independent lab data required.
